query:
SELECT 
  ma.id AS agendamento_id,
  ma.scheduledDate,
  ma.title,
  c.name AS mentor_nome,
  ap.alunoId,
  a.name AS aluno_nome,
  p.name AS empresa_nome
FROM mentor_appointments ma
JOIN appointment_participants ap ON ap.appointmentId = ma.id
LEFT JOIN alunos a ON ap.alunoId = a.id
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON ma.consultorId = c.id
LEFT JOIN programs p ON a.programId = p.id
WHERE ma.scheduledDate IN ('2026-03-11', '2026-03-20')
AND ma.status != 'cancelado'
AND NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM mentoring_sessions ms
  WHERE ms.consultorId = ma.consultorId
  AND ms.sessionDate = ma.scheduledDate
  AND ms.alunoId = ap.alunoId
)
ORDER BY ma.scheduledDate, ma.title, a.name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute 
SELECT 
  ma.id AS agendamento_id,
  ma.scheduledDate,
  ma.title,
  c.name AS mentor_nome,
  ap.alunoId,
  a.name AS aluno_nome,
  p.name AS empresa_nome
FROM mentor_appointments ma
JOIN appointment_participants ap ON ap.appointmentId = ma.id
LEFT JOIN alunos a ON ap.alunoId = a.id
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON ma.consultorId = c.id
LEFT JOIN programs p ON a.programId = p.id
WHERE ma.scheduledDate IN ('2026-03-11', '2026-03-20')
AND ma.status != 'cancelado'
AND NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM mentoring_sessions ms
  WHERE ms.consultorId = ma.consultorId
  AND ms.sessionDate = ma.scheduledDate
  AND ms.alunoId = ap.alunoId
)
ORDER BY ma.scheduledDate, ma.title, a.name;
